title: Rhynchostele hortensiae
taxonomy: Rhynchostele hortensiae is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Rhynchostele. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This species is further classified as part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subtribe Cymbidieae is also associated with Rhynchostele hortensiae. Within this classification, Rhynchostele hortensiae is considered an epiphytic orchid.
